title: Datasets for tutorials of MDRefine Python package
author: Gilardoni, Ivan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Datasets for tutorials of  MDRefine  Python package. 
 See   https://github.com/bussilab/MDRefine   and  https://pypi.org/project/MDRefine/ . 
 These datasets are derived from the analysis of some Molecular Dynamics (MD) simulations, as described in the jupyter notebooks  load_data_alchemical.ipynb  (for  DATA_alchemical , corresponding to methylated RNA systems) and  load_data_oligomers.ipynb  (for  DATA , corresponding to RNA oligomers) in the GitHub directory. 
 They can be used to run the  Tutorial*.ipynb  notebooks in the GitHub directory, which show some examples of refinement of molecular systems as described in the corresponding paper "  MDRefine: a Python package for refining Molecular Dynamics trajectories with experimental data  ".
